site.name: Muhammad Mustakeem
site.title: Senior Unity Developer | AR/VR & 3D Game Specialist
site.intro: Unity developer specializing in AR/VR simulations, multiplayer systems, and high-performance 3D games.
site.about: I am a Unity developer with 4+ years of experience building mobile games, VR simulations, and multiplayer experiences. I specialize in Oculus Quest, ARFoundation, WebXR, and multiplayer systems using Photon and Netcode. My work includes enterprise VR training simulations and published mobile games with more than 500K downloads.

services.title: Unity Game Development
services.description: Full cycle Unity game development for mobile, PC and WebGL including gameplay systems, UI, optimization and publishing.

services.title: AR / VR Application Development
services.description: Building immersive AR and VR experiences using Oculus SDK, ARFoundation, OpenXR and WebXR.

services.title: Multiplayer Game Development
services.description: Real-time multiplayer systems using Photon PUN 2, Unity Netcode and Relay.

services.title: Mobile Game Optimization
services.description: Performance optimization using GPU instancing, asset bundles, addressables and memory profiling.

services.title: VR Training Simulations
services.description: Enterprise VR simulations for industries including aviation and warehouse training.

services.title: Rapid Game Prototyping
services.description: Quick development of prototypes to validate gameplay ideas and mechanics.

achievements.title: 500K+ Game Downloads
achievements.description: Mobile games reached more than 500,000 downloads across app stores.

achievements.title: High User Ratings
achievements.description: Maintained 4.5+ ratings on multiple published mobile games.

achievements.title: Performance Optimization
achievements.description: Reduced VR lag by 40% through GPU optimization and occlusion culling.

achievements.title: User Retention Increase
achievements.description: Improved retention by 30% using multiplayer features and reward systems.

testimonials.name: Game Studio Client
testimonials.text: Mustakeem delivered a highly optimized Unity project and maintained excellent communication throughout development.

testimonials.name: VR Product Manager
testimonials.text: The VR training simulator significantly improved our training workflow.

testimonials.name: Indie Game Developer
testimonials.text: Reliable Unity developer with strong expertise in multiplayer and optimization.

testimonials.name: gforgame
testimonials.text: Muhammad M delivered exceptional work with top-tier professionalism in Game Development. His quick responsiveness made collaborating a breeze. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: akshata12310439
testimonials.text: Muhammad has been excellent, very supportive and patient in understanding the requirements. He delivered the project on time with all the necessary changes. Very professional at his work and skill. I would recommend working with him and will consider him for future projects.

testimonials.name: maxipad09
testimonials.text: He is a very cooperative developer and one I look forward to continue to work with. He really cares about his clients.

testimonials.name: frugalprof
testimonials.text: Muhammad continues to work on a VR project I wanted by adding functions, and so far it has been a great experience. He is always willing to discuss how to make the app more interesting and efficient.

testimonials.name: faustobase
testimonials.text: Muhammad M exceeded my expectations in game development with his bug-free, professional work. His attention to detail and quick responsiveness made the collaboration seamless. He went above and beyond in delivery time.

testimonials.name: akinloluwab
testimonials.text: It was great working with Muhammad. His professionalism and expertise were top-notch. I will always recommend him for VR/AR/MR projects.

testimonials.name: zurich23
testimonials.text: Muhammad is helping me with a very specific project and I am very happy with my GDD document. Now we move forward with milestones and tasks to complete my metaverse. So far I am very happy and look forward to seeing a prototype.

testimonials.name: denizbylaced
testimonials.text: Great work! Professional, very kind person, great understanding and very hard working. Will definitely continue working with him on further basis. Strongly recommend.

experience.description: Developing enterprise VR training simulations for aviation and warehouse industries. Implemented multiplayer collaboration systems and optimized VR performance achieving 90 FPS on Quest 2.
Built WebXR gallery templates and implemented ARCore marker tracking with improved asset loading performance.
Developed and published multiple hyper-casual mobile games with Unity Ads monetization and multiplayer features.

contact.message: Feel free to contact me if you need a Unity, AR/VR, or multiplayer developer.

projects.title: EcoQuest
projects.description: A Unity game featuring procedural level generation and environmental gameplay mechanics.

projects.title: VR Plane Marshalling Trainer
projects.description: VR training simulator designed to teach aircraft marshalling signals and procedures using realistic hand gesture interactions.

projects.description: VR application allowing users to manage clothing items inside a virtual wardrobe using intuitive hand interactions.

projects.description: Enterprise VR training simulator designed to teach warehouse operations and logistics workflows.

projects.description: VR-based training system that analyzes worker posture and helps correct improper lifting and working positions.

projects.title: VR Interaction System
projects.description: Reusable VR interaction framework supporting grabbing, distance grab, object interaction, and physics-based manipulation.
